title: SEEDS - 211info
text: INSIGHTS YOUNG PARENT SERVICES SEEDS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers in home parent education, child developmental screenings and support services. Utilizes the Parents as Teachers (PAT) curriculum 4900 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Parents age 22 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm (503) 239-6996 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 239-6996 Main phone Main phone (503) 239-6996 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County (Portland City limits) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet buses 12, 77, and 75. Near Hollywood Transit Center. Services: Home Based Parenting Education Parent/Child Activity Groups Pediatric Developmental Screening Teen Expectant/New Parent Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - HOUSING ASSISTANCE FOR PREGNANT AND PARENTING YOUTH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ECHO INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOMESAFE PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING RESOURCES INFORMATION SERVICES - CHRISTINA PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
